communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Arkansas Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

Please provide to me the video-recorded content of the post-Miranda in-custody interview(s) of

24-year-old Dalton Childs

https://www.thv11.com/article/news/crime/hot-springs-arrest-deadly-shooting-central-avenue/91-d4bef1e4-2932-4856-b85b-4688b2aca054

If there IS NO such footage, you may close this request.

Thank you. My name and address follow:

Damon Verial

3205 Grandview St

Gig Harbor, WA 98335

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 3 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Damon Verial

communications.subject: California Public Records Act Request: Richardson Bay Regional Agency
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the California Public Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

All settlements agreements made by the Richardson Bay Regional Agency between January 1, 2015 until May 9, 2026.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 calendar days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Robbie Powelson

communications.subject: California Public Records Act Request: Berkeley Settlement Agreement
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the California Public Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

All settlement agreements made by the City of Berkeley between January 1 2020 to May 9 2026.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 calendar days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Robbie Powelson
